[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111110100 6
1 100000101 3
2 011100011 5
3 101001001 4
4 001101111 6
5 111110100 6
6 001100010 3
7 000010000 1

01 10 111110111 8
12 21 111110111 8
23 32 101111111 8
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 111110110 7
56 65 001110010 4
67 76 000011111 5
70 07 101111111 8

02 20 101110111 7
13 31 011111111 8
24 42 111110110 7
35 53 001101111 6 match 4
46 64 111110100 6 match 0 5
57 75 001111111 7
60 06 101110111 7
71 17 011111111 8

25 52 101110110 6
36 63 001111111 7
47 74 111111111 a
50 05 101100111 6
61 16 011110011 6
72 27 101011111 7

26 62 101010110 5
37 73 001111111 7
